tools.name: property_details_tool
tools.description: Fetch full details for a single Unlisted property by its ID. When telling the user what you're doing, say "area" not "boundary", and "home" or "property profile" not "listing". Don't mention internal IDs or parameter names.

tools.name: property_search_tool
tools.description: Search for properties on Unlisted that meet certain criteria. boundary_id should always be used unless doing a nation-wide search, and is obtained by using the autocomplete_tool. Returns up to 100 matches; use max_results only when the user asks for a specific count. When telling the user what you'r

tools.name: autocomplete_tool
tools.description: Autocomplete a search term to find geographic areas (cities, counties, neighborhoods, school districts, states, etc.) and properties by address. Use this to look up boundary IDs for the boundary_id parameter in PropertySearch, OR Use this to look up property IDs for the id parameter in property deta

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "property_details_tool" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Fetch full details for a single Unlisted property by its ID. When telling the user what you're doing, say "area" not "boundary", and "home" or "property profile…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
